name: ai-spec-lifecycle
description: Auriora spec lifecycle plugins for Claude Code (version-pinned remote install). Host this file at a URL and add it with `claude plugin marketplace add <url>`; the git-subdir source resolves without cloning manually and pins to the release tag.

plugins.name: spec-lifecycle-manager
plugins.description: Lifecycle guidance and read-only MCP tools for AI-assisted implementation specs.
